query: Get me started with ToughTongue AI.
expected_behavior: Calls ttai:list_organizations first and reports whether the account is personal or has organizations
Calls ttai:list_scenarios and ttai:list_sessions with a small limit and summarizes the account state in 2-3 sentences
Recommends a first journey matching the account state (creator for empty accounts, analyst when analyzed sessions exist, refiner for low-scoring scenarios)
Closes with 2-3 concrete example prompts to try next
Never asks the user to paste their PAT into the chat

query: Is my ToughTongue MCP working? I just installed the plugin but I'm getting errors.
expected_behavior: Attempts ttai:list_organizations to reproduce the failure

Distinguishes the two failure modes: tools missing (MCP not registered — restart guidance or manual mcp add commands) versus 401 (TTAI_PAT not visible — export, launchctl setenv on macOS, full app restart)
Gives the fix for the observed failure mode only, not a generic dump of all troubleshooting steps
Offers to re-verify after the user applies the fix
